title: Manga Lettering Spec
description: Per-chapter lettering plan. v3 adds text_by_locale on dialogue lines, sfx_by_locale, narrator_caption_by_locale, and per-locale font overrides — letting one layered render ship to multiple markets without re-rendering art (per PR #631 Decision 1: 50–99× cost reduction across 5 markets vs re-render-per-locale). Bubble render V2 adds furigana, vertical_kanji, demonic_bubble, fractional head boxes for tails, mouth_anchor, plus text manifests for publish-time rehydration. v2 fields kept for backward compatibility — a v2 spec uses default-locale text only.

lettering_spec_version.description: 2.0.0 = single-locale text on each dialogue line (default-locale only). 3.0.0 = text_by_locale dict per dialogue line + sfx_by_locale + narrator_caption_by_locale. Defaults to 2.0.0 if absent.

default_locale.description: v3 — primary authoring locale. The fallback used when a localized variant is missing. Defaults to en_US if absent.

available_locales.description: v3 — locales this spec carries text for. Renderer ensures each dialogue_line has either text_by_locale[<L>] for every L in this list, or falls back via default_locale.

text.description: v2 default-locale text. v3: kept for backward-compat; the renderer prefers text_by_locale[default_locale] when present and falls back to this string when absent.

text_by_locale.description: v3 — per-locale dialogue text. Keys must be a subset of available_locales. Renderer composites text per market at compose-time, NOT at art-render time.

font_override.description: v2 default-locale font override. v3: kept for backward-compat.

font_override_by_locale.description: v3 — per-locale font override. Useful when CJK fonts can't render the same Latin emphasis style and need a different override. Falls back to font_override when locale not present.

furigana.description: V2 lettering — structured ruby segments for Japanese. Each base substring appears in-order within the localized dialogue text.

vertical_kanji.description: V2 lettering — vertical top-to-bottom CJK columns (writing-mode vertical-rl equivalent) when true.

demonic_bubble.description: V2 lettering — supernatural wavy bubble styling when enabled.

mouth_anchor.description: Normalized (0–1) panel-space mouth point for tail aiming.

sfx.description: v2 default-locale SFX list. v3: kept for backward-compat.

sfx_by_locale.description: v3 — per-locale SFX list. Japanese onomatopoeia ('ドキドキ') localize differently per market — leave them as-is for ja_JP, transliterate for en_US, translate for zh_TW/zh_CN per series convention.

narrator_caption.description: v2 default-locale narrator caption. v3: kept for backward-compat.

narrator_caption_by_locale.description: v3 — per-locale narrator caption. Falls back to narrator_caption when locale absent.

estimated_bubble_coverage.description: Computed at default_locale. Renderer re-checks per locale at compose-time since CJK ↔ Latin can shift coverage by 30–50%.

estimated_bubble_coverage_by_locale.description: v3 — actual per-locale coverage after compose. Useful for the Scroll Therapeutic Test (PR #631 Decision 6) which checks bubble coverage caps.

character_head_bboxes.description: V2 lettering — fractional head bbox per speaker (0–1) for auto tail targeting.
